clinical_layer_findings.bader_family_background: Drs. Alamdar, Shafeeq, and Zishan Bader are licensed dentists who founded Dental Heights (Glendale Heights IL, 2013, family-owned). Their professional corporations (DR ALAMDAR H BADER DDS PC, DR ZISHAN BADER DDS SC) are separately registered at 654 E 47th St alongside the Chicago Dentistry LLC / Archer Dentistry entity. No documented link between the Bader family dentists and ownership of Chicago Dentistry LLC has been found.
clinical_layer_findings.inference: The co-registration of three dentist-owned professional corporations at the same address as Chicago Dentistry LLC / Archer Dentistry Chicago strongly suggests a PC-MSO arrangement: the Bader DDS PCs (and Satnam Dental Care SC) operate as the licensed clinical entities while Chicago Dentistry LLC / Archer Dentistry functions as the business/management layer. This is the standard Illinois corporate-practice-of-dentistry compliance structure for non-dentist-managed dental networks.

proposed_disposition.reasoning: Chicago Dentistry LLC / Archer Dentistry operates a 5-location (4 IL, 1 IN) dental network under local-branded practice names. The NPPES authorized official is Hamza Mohammed, titled 'Administrator' with no dental credential. Multiple dentist-owned professional corporations are co-registered at the candidate address (654 E 47th St), consistent with Illinois corporate practice of dentistry compliance via PC-MSO arrangement. Under the PM's stated decision rule ('If the controlling member is a non-dentist e.g., an administrator or outside investor with multiple locations, that pattern is T4 stealth_dso'), this row warrants T4 classification. The MSO structure is inferred from the PC co-registration pattern — no explicit MSO agreement or MSO corporate entity has been found in public records. Confidence is MODERATE rather than HIGH because: (1) the IL SOS member/manager data for Chicago Dentistry LLC was not obtained (website blocked); (2) Mohammed's controlling-member status is inferred from NPPES AO designation, not confirmed from the articles of organization; (3) the formal MSO documentation is inferred from structural indicators rather than a documentary artifact.
proposed_disposition.pm_decision_required: Whether the structural PC-MSO inference (three dentist professional corporations co-registered at the same address as a non-dentist-managed multi-location LLC) is sufficient to meet the T4 'documented MSO/platform' bar — OR whether IL SOS member data is required before releasing from hold.
proposed_disposition.alternative_if_pm_applies_strict_documen: stay-held in hold_needs_more_evidence. Resolution path: IL SOS Cyber Drive lookup for 'Chicago Dentistry LLC' members/managers; or IDFPR dental-office license search at 654 E 47th St.
proposed_disposition.not_T3_rationale: T3 requires dentist-owned. Mohammed is confirmed non-dentist. No dentist has been identified as the owner or controlling member of Chicago Dentistry LLC. The Bader DDS PCs are separately owned clinical entities, not the owner-dentist of Chicago Dentistry LLC itself.
proposed_disposition.not_T5_rationale: Archer Dentistry is a local brand (4 IL locations, unnamed in national DSO databases). No known DSO acquirer or national platform affiliation found. No PE sponsor documented.
